title: Portable Context Control Plane — Warning Code Definition
description: Schema for a single planning warning object. Warning codes are an advisory (open) string enum — new codes may be added in future passes. Harness checks must compare against exact string literals, not rely on schema-enforced closed enum. Canonical owner: docs/06 §3.4; docs/12 §6.2.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-2A — Batch A. No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. Canonical sources: docs/06 §3.4, docs/12 §6.2.

code.title: Warning code
code.description: Machine-readable string constant identifying the warning type. Advisory (open) enum — not a closed enum. Known MVP codes are listed in $comment for reference. Unrecognized codes must not cause schema validation failure (forward compatibility).
code.$comment: Known MVP global per-run codes: injection_suspect_warn_and_continue, injection_suspect_fail_open_all, policy_value_not_implemented, injection_action_unknown, family_confidence_fail_open_escalation, history_malformed_conflict_occurred, runtime_capabilities_missing, selector_policy_defaulted, history_summary_missing, budget_config_missing, active_ids_missing, selector_policy_defaulted, unexpected_quarantine_reference, active_id_unknown, path_a_null_evidence, unexpected_ladder_fallback, unsupported_candidate_set_policy. Per-decision codes: injection_suspect_policy_override, injection_suspect_omit_allowed, runtime_capability_unavailable, lane_missing, hard_protected_tool_unavailable. Per-conflict codes: history_malformed_conflict. Budget codes: budget_cost_unknown, over_budget_protected, budget_pressure_seen. NOTE: warning codes are NOT a closed enum in schema — this list is for documentation only.

componentId.title: Component ID (optional)
componentId.description: The registry component ID this warning applies to, if the warning is component-scoped. Absent for global per-run warnings.

message.title: Warning message
message.description: Human-readable explanation of the warning. Must not contain raw component text or raw history turn content.

examples.message: Runtime capabilities input was absent. Treating capabilityInventoryComplete as false; all tool availability unknown; all tool components included.
Injection-suspect signal detected. Effective policy: warn_and_continue. Safety, policy, and history-durable omit decisions upgraded to include/fail_open.
Active skill ID 'skill.unknown_skill_xyz' was not found in componentsById. Treated as absent; no SelectionDecision produced for this ID.
